title: Regolamenti dwar il-Ħlas ta' Dritt lill-Barklori
title_en: Regolamenti dwar il-Ħlas ta' Dritt lill-Barklori
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/73.1/mlt, expression eli/sl/73.1/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: 16 ta’ Settembru, 1957
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar il}las ta’ Dritt lill-Barklori.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
L-a[ent ta’ kull vapur, li l-passi[[ieri tieg]u jkunu
imbarkaw jew sbarkaw b’mezzi barra minn dg]ajjes, g]andu mhux
aktar tard minn erbg]a u g]oxrin sieg]a wara t-tluq tal-vapur,
jibg]at lill-Kontrullur tad-Dwana werrej li juri n-numru ta’
passi[[ieri li jkunu hekk imbarkaw jew sbarkaw f ’kull [urnata
s]i]a li matulha l-vapur baqa’ fil-port, b’dettalji fuq kull passi[[ier
dwar jekk huwa jkunx imbarka biss jew sbarka biss jew it-tnejn.

L-a[ent g]andu
jibg]at werrej lillKontrullur tadDwana.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
G]andu jit]allas dritt ta’ erba’ `ente\mi (0.04) g]al kull
passi[[ier li jimbarka jew jisbarka b’dan il-mod u ta’ tmien
`ente\mi (0.08) g]al kull passi[[ier li jimbarka u jisbarka b’dan ilmod jew jisbarka jew jimbarka f’[urnata wa]da u l-ammont totali
g]andu jit]allas mill-a[ent tal-vapur lill-Kontrullur tad-Dwana fil]in li huwa jibg]at il-werrej imsemmi fir-regolament 2, bi tnaqqis
ta’ ]amsa fil-mija fuq l-ammont imsemmi hawn fuq, illi l-a[ent talvapur jista’ j\omm b]ala ]las g]as-servizzi tieg]u.

Drittijiet.
Emendat:
A.L. 408 ta’ l2007.

provisions.title: Drittijiet
provisions.content:
Il-Kontrullur tad-Dwana g]andu, kull sitt xhur, i]allas lil
rappre\entant tal-barklori li jkollhom il-li`en\a li ja]dmu fil-Port
il-Kbir u fil-Port ta’ Marsamxett kull flus li ji[bor mill-]las tadd r i t t i j i e t i m s e m m i j i n f i r- r e g o l a m e n t 3 u g ] a n d h a t k u n i rr e s p o n s a b b i l t à t a ’ d a n i r- r a p p r e \ e n t a n t l i j q a s s a m i l - f l u s
imsenmijin fi proporzjonijiet indaqs fost il-barklori li, kif imsemmi
hawn fuq, ikollhom il-li`enza kif g]andha tkun, matul i\-\mien li
jkollu x’jaqsam.

Il-Kontrullur tadDwana j]allas lflus li ji[bor.
